Home / Suites

The suites

Eight suites strung along the riverbed, each one private, design-led and rate-inclusive of meals, drinks and twice-daily game drives. Booked direct, with zero added fees.

All rates fully inclusive · instant confirmation · no booking fees
Sleeps 2

River Suite

Private plunge poolRiver deckOutdoor showerSala

Glass-walled and cantilevered over the dry riverbed, where elephants pass below at first light. The signature Sabela suite — and the one guests ask for by name.

R12,500 pp / night · all-inclusive
View suite Check dates
Sleeps 2

Treehouse Suite

Raised canopySliding star roofPlunge poolMost private

Lifted into the jackalberry canopy, with a roof that slides back above the bed for sleeping under the Milky Way. The most secluded suite on the reserve.

R14,500 pp / night · all-inclusive
View suite Check dates
Sleeps 4

Family Villa

Two bedroomsShared loungePrivate vehicleChildminder

Two interconnecting suites around a shared lounge and pool, with a dedicated guide and vehicle. Built for families travelling together, at their own pace.

R11,000 pp / night · all-inclusive
View suite Check dates
By request
The Honeymoon Hide
Our most private retreat — a star bed, outdoor bath and a butler. Available on request only.

Take the whole lodge

For a family celebration, a wedding, or a private group — reserve all eight suites and Sabela is yours alone.
